goal: real_from_rat_fn(p + q) = real_from_rat_fn(p) + real_from_rat_fn(q) and real_from_rat_fn(p * q) = real_from_rat_fn(p) * real_from_rat_fn(q)

real_from_rat_fn(Rat.1) = Real.1 and forall(x0: Rat, x1: Rat) { real_from_rat_fn(x0 + x1) = real_from_rat_fn(x0) + real_from_rat_fn(x1) and real_from_rat_fn(x0 * x1) = real_from_rat_fn(x0) * real_from_rat_fn(x1) }
proof: let w0: Rat satisfy { exists(k0: Rat) { real_from_rat_fn(w0 + k0) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) + real_from_rat_fn(k0) or real_from_rat_fn(w0 * k0) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) * real_from_rat_fn(k0) } }
let w1: Rat satisfy { real_from_rat_fn(w0 + w1) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) + real_from_rat_fn(w1) or real_from_rat_fn(w0 * w1) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) * real_from_rat_fn(w1) }
let w2: Rat satisfy { real_from_rat_fn(w0 + w2) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) + real_from_rat_fn(w2) or real_from_rat_fn(w0 * w2) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) * real_from_rat_fn(w2) }
function(x0: Rat, x1: Rat) { real_from_rat_fn(x0 + x1) = real_from_rat_fn(x0) + real_from_rat_fn(x1) and real_from_rat_fn(x0 * x1) = real_from_rat_fn(x0) * real_from_rat_fn(x1) }(w0, w2)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T1 -> T0) { (x0(T1.1) = T0.1 and forall(x1: T1, x2: T1) { x0(x1 + x2) = x0(x1) + x0(x2) and x0(x1 * x2) = x0(x1) * x0(x2) }) = is_ring_hom[T1, T0](x0) }[Real, Rat](real_from_rat_fn)

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: T0 -> T1) { not RingHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: RingHom[T0, T1]) { RingHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_fn)

goal: exists(k0: RingHom[Rat, Real]) { RingHom.new[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_fn) = Option.some(k0) }

proof: let w0: Rat satisfy { real_from_rat_ring_hom.hom(w0) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) }

function[T0: lib(ring).Ring, T1: lib(ring).Ring](x0: RingHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[RingHom[T0, T1]](x0) != RingHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_ring_hom, real_from_rat_fn, w0)
function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { is_ring_hom[T0, T1](x0) = is_field_hom[T0, T1](x0) }[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_fn)

function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: T0 -> T1) { not FieldHom.constraint[T0, T1](x0) or exists(k0: FieldHom[T0, T1]) { FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x0) = Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](k0) } }[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_fn)

goal: exists(k0: FieldHom[Rat, Real]) { FieldHom.new[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_fn) = Option.some(k0) }

proof: let w0: Rat satisfy { real_from_rat_field_hom.hom(w0) != real_from_rat_fn(w0) }

function[T0: lib(field).Field, T1: lib(field).Field](x0: FieldHom[T0, T1], x1: T0 -> T1, x2: T0) { Option.some[FieldHom[T0, T1]](x0) != FieldHom.new[T0, T1](x1) or x0.hom(x2) = x1(x2) }[Rat, Real](real_from_rat_field_hom, real_from_rat_fn, w0)
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or not x0 < x1 }[Real](lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(p), lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(q))
function(x0: Real, x1: Real) { x0 > x1 or x0 <= x1 }(lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(p), lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(q))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { x0 > x1 = x1 < x0 }[Real](lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(q), lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(p))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { not x0 > x1 or x0 != x1 }[Real](lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(q), lib(real.real_base).real_from_rat(p))
function[T0: lib(order).PartialOrder](x0: T0, x1: T0) { (x0 <= x1 and x0 != x1) = x0 < x1 }[Rat](p, q)
